skills.name: codex-agent
skills.description: 用 OpenClaw 驱动 Codex CLI 的受管运行时。支持交互式 tmux 会话、一次性 exec 任务、会话状态查询、显式 session-id 路由、启动阻塞识别与完成通知。

skills.name: Use these with care - anyone can enter into your VM through these...
skills.description: 你MAC的端口 ＝ VM的IP:VM的端口 ``` 重启服务 ``` sudo /Applications/VMware\ Fusion.app/Contents/Library/vmnet-cli --stop sudo /Applications/VMware\ Fusion.app/Contents/Library/vmnet-cli --start ``` permission 报错 ``` Permission denied, please try again. ``` 打开 ssh 的 root 权限
skills.installCommand: npx skills add majiayu000/claude-skill-registry --skill Use these with care - anyone can enter into your VM through these...

skills.name: Zola AI — Technical Skills & Architecture
skills.description: > **Hackathon Judges**: This document covers Zola AI's core technical achievements, architecture decisions, and the cluster-switching system. Live demo: [use-zola.vercel.app/](https://use-zola.vercel.app/)
skills.installCommand: npx skills add Jeffreyxdev/zola-ai --skill Zola AI — Technical Skills & Architecture
